title: Pan-Fried Bao Dumplings with Garlic and Golden Sauce
description: A simple and delicious recipe for pan-fried bao dumplings with a flavorful golden sauce and a hint of garlic. Serve as a snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: Golden sauce
ingredients.notes: see notes for homemade golden sauce recipe

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add diced potatoes and cook until they start to brown.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add bao dough pieces to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer cooked bao to a plate and brush with golden sauce.
Sprinkle chopped scallions on top, if using.
To make homemade golden sauce, mix together 1/4 cup soy sauce, 1/4 cup honey, and 2 tablespoons rice vinegar in a small bowl.
